summary: Prompt Flight ui_session_rest now sends the exact AgentStudio REST payload to /api/agent/session, polls the real session, reads runtime-truth and runtime artifacts. Live run proved real worker launch; task failed because nested Codex sandbox could not write files with bwrap loopback error.

validation_ran.reason: real worker launched but nested Codex sandbox could not write docs/circuit_probe_canary.md; runtime captured missing expected file and bwrap loopback blocker

real_evidence.workerEvidence: Codex worker launched, attempted apply_patch, failed to write expected file due bwrap loopback sandbox error.

blockers: Nested Codex worker sandbox cannot write inside generated project in this environment: bwrap loopback Failed RTM_NEWADDR and apply_patch write failures.
The live run did not create docs/circuit_probe_canary.md, so validation correctly failed.
Prompt-flight timeout was shorter than full backend recovery path in the third live run; report still persisted at runtime/continuity_probe/prompt-flight-20260527T070404Z/prompt_flight_report.json.
next_recommendation: Run the same ui_session_rest mode after fixing nested Codex sandbox permissions, or configure worker execution with a sandbox mode that can write under workspace/projects/<slug>.
